vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.meaning: rất đắt đỏ / tốn rất nhiều tiền
vocab.example: Even though a Rolex might cost an arm and a leg, many people see it as a worthwhile long-term investment.

vocab.meaning: ăn mặc chỉnh tề, sang trọng (thường đi kèm phụ kiện đắt tiền)
vocab.example: High-profile executives often wear luxury watches when they are dressed to the nines for gala events to complete their look.

vocab.meaning: trông rất lôi cuốn, sang trọng và tự tin
vocab.example: A sophisticated timepiece can make the wearer look a million dollars, even if the rest of their outfit is quite simple.

vocab.meaning: chi tiêu quá khả năng / làm khánh kiệt ngân sách
vocab.example: Some enthusiasts are willing to break the bank just to get their hands on a limited-edition watch that likely increases in value.

vocab.word: a chip off the old block
vocab.meaning: người có đặc điểm giống hệt bố mẹ (dùng khi nói về việc thừa kế gu thẩm mỹ/đồng hồ)
vocab.example: My father always wore a Patek Philippe, and being a chip off the old block, I’ve developed the same fascination for high-end horology.
